samples.xml_description:
<module id="width_8to16">
    <description>Converts 8-bit data to 16-bit data.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset.</input>
        <input id="valid_in">Input data valid.</input>
        <input id="data_in" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit input data.</input>
        <output id="valid_out">Output data valid.</output>
        <output id="data_out" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit output data.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>Contains parameter descriptions.</parameter_description>
    <logic_description>Contains internal signals.</logic_description>
    <implementation>
    The data_out is triggered on the positive edge of the clock or negative edge of the reset signal. 
    On reset, it is cleared to 0. If the input data is valid and the flag signal is active, 
    the data_out register is updated by concatenating the contents of the data_lock register and the data_in register.
    </implementation>
</module>
